role: ETF detail fallback while StockAnalysis ETF REST endpoints are not indexed yet

overview.description: The fund will pursue its investment objective by providing investors with income distributions. Under normal circumstances, it invests at least 80% of its net assets (plus any borrowings for investment purposes) in equity securities and equity-linked securities (“80% policy”). The fund is non-diversified.

info.longName: Janus Henderson Equity Linked Moderate Income ETF
